summary: Frontend testing completed for Quick Actions relocation from Menu to My Account page. All features verified working correctly.

my_account_page.quick_actions_section: PASS - Shows 'Quick Actions' header with 'Edit' button and 6 dynamic tiles
my_account_page.quick_actions_tiles: PASS - Default tiles: Account Setup, Brand Kit, Review Links, Brand Assets, Approvals, Edit Card
my_account_page.edit_button: PASS - Edit button toggles to 'Done' when edit panel is open
my_account_page.edit_panel: PASS - Shows 18 available actions with numbered badges (1-6) on selected items
my_account_page.add_action: PASS - Tapping unselected action adds it to Quick Actions
my_account_page.remove_action: PASS - Tapping selected action removes it from Quick Actions
my_account_page.max_limit: PASS - Shows 'Max 6 Quick Actions' instruction in edit panel
my_account_page.profile_ai_section: PASS - Shows 'Profile & AI' with 4 items: My Digital Card, My Link Page, AI Persona, Voice Training
my_account_page.navigation: PASS - My Digital Card navigates to /settings/my-profile

menu_page.no_quick_actions: PASS - Quick Actions section successfully removed
menu_page.no_edit_button: PASS - No Edit Quick Actions button present
menu_page.no_profile_ai: PASS - No Profile & AI section (correctly only on My Account)
menu_page.profile_card: PASS - Profile card present showing user info
menu_page.collapsible_sections: PASS - All 7 sections present: Administration, Tools, Campaigns, Reports, Templates & Branding, Contacts & Leads, Settings

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Actions system has been moved from Menu page to My Account page. My Account now has: Quick Actions (configurable via Edit), Profile & AI section, My Activity, Settings. Menu page is clean with collapsible sections only.
